releases.introKey: Revamped personal records with badges and celebrations, deeper sleep analysis, a smarter Today dashboard, and live set timers — DUNE now tracks every milestone.
Exercise form coaching with voice cues, corrective exercise recommendations, a redesigned Life tab, and Watch posture monitoring — DUNE now coaches every rep.
AI posture analysis, morning briefings, RPE trend insights, an upgraded 3D muscle map, and smarter Watch workouts — DUNE now sees how you move.
Set-level RPE, stair climbing, VO2 Max tracking, workout rewards, and smarter sleep analysis — your fitness toolkit keeps growing.
Health Q&A, AI workout builder, sleep predictions, injury alerts, a 3D muscle map, and more — your training just got smarter.
Widgets, weather, coaching, sleep debt, cardio tracking, themes, and three languages — all in one update.
Track workouts, check your condition, and see your progress — all built around your body's data.
